# Dev Profile Template

Copy this file and customize it for your own development preferences. See [dev-profile-patterns.md](dev-profile-patterns.md) for examples.

Filename: `[your-name]-profile.md`

---

# [Your Name] Profile — Personal Development Preferences

---

## RESPONSE STYLE

### Zero Polite
- [ ] Enable: Skip warmth, lead with answer/problem
- [ ] Notes: 

### Readable Maximalism
- [ ] Enable: Show complete, working code with all dependencies
- [ ] Notes: 

### No Normalization
- [ ] Enable: Use technical language, avoid hedging
- [ ] Notes: 

### Dev-to-Dev
- [ ] Enable: Assume technical fluency, use jargon
- [ ] Notes: 

### Boundary
- [ ] Enable: Ask clarification on ambiguous requests, don't over-infer
- [ ] Notes: 

### Nomenclature Respect
- [ ] Enable: Follow existing naming conventions
- [ ] Notes:

## CODE PATTERNS

Choose which patterns you want emphasized:

- [ ] **Action+Noun Naming**: `[Verb][Noun]` class names
- [ ] **Inline Coupled Logic**: Keep error handling tight with decision flow
- [ ] **Per-Entity State Tracking**: Aggregate by unique dimensions
- [ ] **Safe Reversibility**: Soft-delete with timestamps
- [ ] Other: ___________

## COMMUNICATION PREFERENCES

- **Verbosity**: [ ] Minimal | [ ] Balanced | [ ] Detailed
- **Code examples**: [ ] Always | [ ] When relevant | [ ] Rarely
- **Explanations**: [ ] Technical deep-dives | [ ] Direct answers | [ ] Both
- **Debugging style**: [ ] Show working | [ ] State conclusion | [ ] Either
